title: TopperPack
description: A simple, lightweight Modpack aimed at improving the performance of minecraft that still adds some QoL and things recommended for using on the Topper network.
body:
Minecraft 1.21.10 Modpack that adds a lot of optimization and includes the mods that are recommended for playing on the Topper network.

Features
- Improved performance (even for weaker systems)
- Pre-installed shaders
- Pre-installed Resourcepacks
- Voicechat for easy communication with peers
- Some Optifine parity
- WorldEdit for building in Creative mode


The modpack has a lot of small optimization mods that will make Minecraft more enjoyable.
